problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
hypothesis: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Bose-Einstein. Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
